name: Neon Cyber
description: Cyberpunk aesthetic with vivid neon accents on pure dark backgrounds. High-energy, high-contrast, data-dense.

decorators.neon-card: Surface card with subtle border that glows cyan on hover, rounded 8px radius, shadow elevation with hover shadow transition
decorators.neon-input: Input field with border that transitions to cyan glow on focus, gentle focus ring with neon primary color
decorators.neon-glass: Frosted glassmorphic panel with backdrop blur(16px), semi-transparent surface background, subtle cyan-tinted border
decorators.neon-code: Monospace code block with surface-raised background, 3px left border in primary cyan, subtle rounded radius
decorators.neon-glow: Element with cyan box-shadow glow effect, pulsing animation on hover
decorators.neon-divider: Horizontal divider with gradient from transparent to primary to transparent
decorators.neon-badge: Small surface-raised background badge with rounded radius and subtle border
